explanations.1: This line checks if the docker ps command returns nothing (empty string), which means no container named sonarqube is running; the ifeq is a Makefile conditional, like an if statement.
explanations.6: The dash before the @ symbol tells Make to ignore errors from this command, and the @symbol hides the command output; the > /dev/null 2>&1 redirects all output to nowhere so nothing prints to the console.
